ChangeNotes.Value: [h3]What's new[/h3][list][*]Fixed: mod settings were not applied until you opened the options menu. Your configured (or default) settings now take effect immediately on game start (Reported by LessTalking).[*]Added: option to share Shipmaster XP with your party's Navigator. Enabled for sea travel by default; ramming and ballista XP sharing are opt-in toggles in the settings.[/list]
